calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Bishnu K. Gharti, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. At the request of the plaintiff, the Court ordered the case dismissed with prejudice. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Continued To Jul-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to July 09, 2024, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2024 Continued To May-07-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. YOSI YAHOUDAI, Esq of JAVAHERI & YAHOUDAI, APLC (Tel: 310-407-0766) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BISHNU GHARTI's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Matter discussed. Counsel Yahoudai states he lost contact with his client. The Court grants the motion for withdrawal of attorney of record.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Continued To Mar-05-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-04-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. PAUL A. SILVER, Esq. (Tel: 510-701-0171) "specially appearing" for movant;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF BISHNU GHARTI.

The Court rules as follows: Matter is ordered off calendar for failure of counsel-of-record to appear. Movant must re-file motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
